title: T-004 — Implement SET-007 Completion Celebration UI screen
prompt:
Implement the final celebration screen (step 6) with confetti animation and next-step cards.

PRD §14.3-14.4: After step 5, user sees a celebration screen with:
- Visual confetti/celebration animation (can use library like confetti-js or canvas)
- Text: "Congratulations! You're ready to go."
- Card grid linking to:
  - Module Toggles (link)
  - Schema Browser (link)
  - Rules Registry (link)

Screen code: SET-007. Step 6 has no form data (just confirmation).

Acceptance:
- Component renders confetti animation on mount
- Three cards visible (Module Toggles, Schema Browser, Rules Registry)
- Each card is clickable with href to the corresponding admin/config module (/admin/toggles, /admin/schema, /admin/rules)
- Matches zeropoint design language (or whichever the project uses)
- Step 6 completion submits to T-002 endpoint with step_number=6, data={}

Test: E2E test navigates to step 6 and verifies confetti starts + cards are clickable.

pipeline_inputs.description: Celebration screen component (SET-007) for onboarding completion
pipeline_inputs.details: Create React component OnboardingCompletionCelebration (or similar) that renders step 6 (final screen). Include: (1) Confetti animation (use confetti-js or similar; fires automatically on mount). (2) Heading text 'Congratulations! You're ready to go.' (3) Subtext explaining next steps. (4) Card grid (3 columns or responsive) with three clickable cards: 'Module Toggles' (links to /admin/toggles), 'Schema Browser' (links to /admin/schema), 'Rules Registry' (links to /admin/rules). Each card includes icon and description. (5) Submit button that calls POST /api/v1/onboarding/step with step_number=6, data={}. Match design language of wizard (RHF form styling, color palette, spacing). Component must be accessible (ARIA labels, semantic HTML). Test via Cypress or Playwright e2e test that verifies confetti renders + all three cards are visible and clickable.
acceptance_criteria: Given user navigates to step 6 screen, when component mounts, then confetti animation plays and 'Congratulations' heading is visible
Given step 6 screen is rendered, when user scrolls, then three cards (Module Toggles, Schema Browser, Rules Registry) are fully visible with clickable links
Given user clicks 'Finish Onboarding' button, when step_number=6 is submitted to endpoint, then endpoint returns status='complete' and wizard closes or redirects
test_strategy: Write e2e test: test_completion_celebration_renders() navigates to step 6 and screenshots confetti
Write e2e test: test_celebration_cards_clickable() verifies href attributes and card navigation
Manual QA: verify confetti timing and animation smoothness
risk_red_lines: Do not hard-code admin URLs; use configurable route constants
Do not block confetti animation from rendering if it fails (graceful fallback)
